scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @accessibility-build/audit-contracts typecheck && pnpm --filter @accessibility-build/extension typecheck && pnpm --filter @accessibility-build/desktop typecheck && pnpm --filter @thewcag/web typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @accessibility-build/audit-contracts test && pnpm --filter @accessibility-build/extension test && pnpm --filter @accessibility-build/a11y-core test && pnpm --filter @accessibility-build/desktop test && pnpm --filter @thewcag/web test && node --test scripts/*.test.mjs
scripts.verify: pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build:extension && pnpm --filter @accessibility-build/desktop build:vite && node scripts/validate-desktop-bundle.mjs && pnpm build:web
